profile.physical_signature: Compact silhouette, short dark hair, alert thoughtful presence.
profile.face: Soft angular face, natural skin texture, expressive eyebrows, focused but approachable.
profile.hair: Short dark hair, slightly tousled, consistent length in every shot.
profile.eyes: Dark attentive eyes that scan the environment with curiosity.
profile.body: Average height and build, relaxed shoulders, practical posture.
profile.movement: Careful, observant movements; pauses before acting.
profile.personality: Curious, quietly brave, thoughtful under pressure.
profile.consistency_notes: Keep age range, hair length, blue jacket, gray shirt, and curious expression consistent.
profile.negative_prompt: different hairstyle, different jacket color, child, elderly, formal suit, heavy makeup

locations.name: City rooftop at dusk
locations.description: Open sky, warm city lights below
